personal.preferred_title: Lead Data Engineer | SQL, Python, ETL, Data Architecture & Reporting Platforms

summary: Lead Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience designing and supporting SQL-driven data platforms, ETL/ELT pipelines, enterprise data migrations, dimensional reporting structures, database designs, API-style integrations, and production data operations. Strong hands-on background in advanced SQL, Python, Oracle, Redshift, MySQL, PL/SQL, Pandas, PySpark, AWS S3/Glue, data quality, pipeline validation, operational reporting, and stakeholder-facing analytics. Experienced mentoring engineers, documenting standards, replacing manual reporting with automated data flows, troubleshooting production issues, and enabling BI/reporting teams with trusted, well-modeled datasets.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Led design and delivery of automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual extraction and reporting workflows with repeatable data flows.

Designed SQL-driven Oracle schemas, Redshift-backed reporting structures, historical data models, and curated datasets supporting executive dashboards, capacity risk analysis, forecasting, and operational decision-making.

Built data processing workflows using advanced SQL, Python, Pandas, PySpark, Spark, Oracle, Redshift, AWS S3, and Glue to collect, normalize, validate, and analyze datasets across multiple enterprise platforms.
Translated stakeholder requirements from infrastructure, application, and business teams into technical data models, pipeline outputs, reporting datasets, and reusable analytics processes.
Integrated data from enterprise monitoring and operational platforms including BMC TrueSight, CA Wily, AppDynamics, CMDB-style sources, and reporting databases into unified analytics workflows.
Created validation, reconciliation, balancing, anomaly-style checks, and data quality routines to improve accuracy, completeness, and trust in recurring reporting datasets.
Optimized SQL queries, transformation logic, storage structures, and reporting workflows to improve performance, maintainability, and repeatability.
Built dashboard-ready datasets and reporting outputs consumed by technical teams and senior stakeholders to understand utilization trends, operational risks, and planning priorities.
Documented data definitions, transformation logic, operational runbooks, data quality rules, and support procedures for production maintainability and team knowledge transfer.
Provided technical guidance and repeatable patterns for teammates supporting recurring data pipelines, reporting workflows, and operational troubleshooting.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput transaction engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster supporting mission-critical transaction volume described internally as 10x VISA scale.
Designed validation tooling in C++/OCCI/OCI to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets and protect data integrity during phased cutover.
Automated schema conversion, data validation, migration readiness checks, and cutover-support workflows for high-volume relational systems.
Optimized Oracle transaction processing and query access patterns, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.
Worked deeply with relational database design, OLTP behavior, SQL access patterns, performance tuning, operational reliability, and data migration risk.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Led the FAST project, data-mining Gomez Synthetic Monitoring metrics to identify optimization opportunities for revenue-generating hospitality systems.
Built analytics and operational reporting workflows that converted raw performance measurements into actionable recommendations for engineering and business stakeholders.
Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical systems, supporting dashboards, transaction tracing, production troubleshooting, and reporting continuity.
Collaborated across engineering teams during monitoring upgrades and maintained reporting quality through Dynatrace 6.5 to 7.0 and TLS 1.2 security cutovers.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Supported a large financial-services monitoring and reporting environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts to automate weekly performance reporting and reduce manual operational effort.
Designed dashboards, SLA thresholds, alerting logic, and reporting standards adopted by client teams for application performance visibility.
Created technical documentation, onboarding material, repeatable support procedures, and stakeholder-facing reporting workflows.
Collaborated with application, infrastructure, and WebLogic performance teams to analyze telemetry, identify bottlenecks, and support production remediation.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications under load to identify database bottlenecks, throughput limits, thread pressure, heap behavior, CPU constraints, and garbage collection impact.
Configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation to improve observability during performance testing.
Documented performance baselines, regression thresholds, and release-risk findings used by engineering teams for production readiness decisions.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modules for the IRS CADE modernization project.
Built CICS, MQ Series, XML, VC++, and DB2 integration components in a structured government modernization environment.
Created technical documentation and supported disciplined delivery practices for a regulated modernization program.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed and supported billing, EDI, invoicing, settlement, and reporting modules across full telecom billing lifecycle workflows.
Built Oracle, PL/SQL, Pro*C, SQL, and C/C++ processing components for high-volume structured billing and reporting data workflows.
Improved C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL billing process performance, reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance via sequence optimization.
Automated WebLogic/WebSphere administration tasks using Korn Shell scripting to reduce manual deployment and support effort.
Supported production troubleshooting, QA cycles, defect triage, and release support for mission-critical telecom billing processes.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: Financial & Operational Reporting Automation at Citi
projects.description: Replaced manual data collection and reporting workflows with automated SQL, Python, Oracle, Redshift, and AWS-oriented pipelines producing repeatable executive reporting, capacity analytics, and operational decision support.

projects.name: High-Volume MySQL to Oracle RAC Migration
projects.description: Led migration of a high-throughput transaction engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster, including schema conversion, validation tooling, performance tuning, and phased cutover support.

projects.name: HorizonScale — Capacity Forecasting & Reporting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python and PySpark forecasting/reporting platform that transformed enterprise telemetry into validated datasets, reduced manual forecasting cycles by 90%, and produced bottleneck predictions 6 months ahead.
